member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Error
member.summary: Represents an immutable error with code, message and optional details. Supports composition of multiple errors.

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Error.Create(System.String,System.String,MonadicSharp.ErrorType)
member.summary: Creates a simple error

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Error.Validation(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a validation error

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Error.FromException(System.Exception,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an error from exception

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Error.NotFound(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a not found error

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Error.Forbidden(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an access denied error

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Error.Conflict(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a conflict error

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Error.Combine(MonadicSharp.Error[])
member.summary: Combines multiple errors into one

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Error.WithMetadata(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds metadata to the error

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Error.WithInnerError(MonadicSharp.Error)
member.summary: Adds an inner error

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Error.IsOfType(MonadicSharp.ErrorType)
member.summary: Checks if the error is of a specific type

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Error.HasCode(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if the error has a specific code

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Error.GetAllErrors
member.summary: Gets all errors (including sub-errors) as a flat list

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Error.ToJson
member.summary: Serializes the error to JSON

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.ErrorType
member.summary: Supported error types

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Extensions.ResultExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods per Result per supportare operazioni funzionali avanzate

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.ResultExtensions.Sequence``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{MonadicSharp.Result{``0}})
member.summary: Trasforma una lista di Result in un Result di lista

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.ResultExtensions.Traverse``2(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,MonadicSharp.Result{``1}})
member.summary: Applica una funzione a ciascun elemento di una lista, fermandosi al primo errore

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.ResultExtensions.Ensure``1(MonadicSharp.Result{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Boolean},MonadicSharp.Error)
member.summary: Applica una funzione che può fallire solo se il Result è Success

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.ResultExtensions.Ensure``1(MonadicSharp.Result{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Boolean},System.String)
member.summary: Applica una funzione che può fallire solo se il Result è Success

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.ResultExtensions.Combine``3(MonadicSharp.Result{``0},MonadicSharp.Result{``1},System.Func{``0,``1,``2})
member.summary: Combina due Result usando una funzione

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.ResultExtensions.MapAsync``2(MonadicSharp.Result{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``1}})
member.summary: Versione asincrona di Map

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.ResultExtensions.BindAsync``2(MonadicSharp.Result{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{``1}}})
member.summary: Versione asincrona di Bind

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.ResultExtensions.OrElse``1(MonadicSharp.Result{``0},System.Func{MonadicSharp.Error,MonadicSharp.Result{``0}})
member.summary: Applica una funzione di recupero in caso di fallimento

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.ResultExtensions.OrElse``1(MonadicSharp.Result{``0},MonadicSharp.Result{``0})
member.summary: Restituisce un Result alternativo in caso di fallimento

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.ResultExtensions.AsTask``1(MonadicSharp.Result{``0})
member.summary: Converte un Result<T> in Task<Result<T>>

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Extensions.OptionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods per Option

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.OptionExtensions.Filter``1(MonadicSharp.Option{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Filtra un Option basato su un predicato

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.OptionExtensions.Sequence``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{MonadicSharp.Option{``0}})
member.summary: Trasforma una lista di Option in un Option di lista (tutti devono avere valore)

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.OptionExtensions.Traverse``2(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,MonadicSharp.Option{``1}})
member.summary: Applica una funzione a ciascun elemento di una lista

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.OptionExtensions.FirstOrNone``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{MonadicSharp.Option{``0}})
member.summary: Restituisce il primo Option che ha un valore

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.OptionExtensions.ToResult``1(MonadicSharp.Option{``0},MonadicSharp.Error)
member.summary: Converte un Option in Result

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.OptionExtensions.ToResult``1(MonadicSharp.Option{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Converte un Option in Result con messaggio di errore

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.OptionExtensions.MapAsync``2(MonadicSharp.Option{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``1}})
member.summary: Versione asincrona di Map

member.summary: Versione asincrona di Bind

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipeExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods per operazioni di piping e composizione funzionale

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipeExtensions.Pipe``2(``0,System.Func{``0,``1})
member.summary: Pipe operation - applica una funzione al valore

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipeExtensions.PipeAsync``2(``0,System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``1}})
member.summary: Pipe operation asincrona

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipeExtensions.Pipe``2(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0},System.Func{``0,``1})
member.summary: Pipe operation per Task

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipelineExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods per pipeline composition avanzata

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipelineExtensions.PipelineAsync``2(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{``0}},MonadicSharp.Extensions.IPipelineStep{``0,``1}[])
member.summary: Compone una pipeline di operazioni con tipi diversi Ogni operazione può trasformare il tipo

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipelineExtensions.Then``1(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{``0}},System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{``0}}})
member.summary: Pipeline fluente con sintassi più leggibile Esempio: await InitialValue().Then(Step1).Then(Step2).Then(Step3).ExecuteAsync();

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipelineExtensions.ThenIf``1(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{``0}},System.Func{``0,System.Boolean},System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{``0}}})
member.summary: Pipeline con gestione condizionale Applica l'operazione solo se la condizione è soddisfatta

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipelineExtensions.ThenWithRetry``1(System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{``0}},System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{``0}}},System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan})
member.summary: Pipeline con retry automatico

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipelineBuilder`1
member.summary: Builder pattern per pipeline fluenti

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipelineBuilder`1.Then(System.Func{`0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{`0}}})
member.summary: Aggiunge un'operazione alla pipeline

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipelineBuilder`1.ThenIf(System.Func{`0,System.Boolean},System.Func{`0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{MonadicSharp.Result{`0}}})
member.summary: Aggiunge un'operazione condizionale

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipelineBuilder`1.Do(System.Func{`0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task})
member.summary: Aggiunge side-effect (logging, etc.) senza modificare il valore

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipelineBuilder`1.ExecuteAsync
member.summary: Esegue la pipeline

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Extensions.IPipelineStep`2
member.summary: Interfaccia per step di pipeline con tipi diversi

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Extensions.PipelineStep`2
member.summary: Implementazione base di un pipeline step

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Option`1
member.summary: Represents an optional value that can be either present (Some) or absent (None). Implements the Option/Maybe pattern to avoid null reference exceptions.
member.typeparam: The type of the contained value

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Option`1.Some(`0)
member.summary: Creates a Some instance containing a value

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Option`1.None
member.summary: Represents the absence of a value

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Option`1.From(`0)
member.summary: Creates an Option from a nullable value

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Option`1.HasValue
member.summary: Indicates if the Option contains a value

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Option`1.IsNone
member.summary: Indicates if the Option is empty

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Option`1.Map``1(System.Func{`0,``0})
member.summary: Applies a function to the value if present

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Option`1.Bind``1(System.Func{`0,MonadicSharp.Option{``0}})
member.summary: Applies a function that returns an Option to the value if present (FlatMap/Bind)

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Option`1.GetValueOrDefault(`0)
member.summary: Returns the value if present, otherwise the default value

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Option`1.GetValueOrDefault(System.Func{`0})
member.summary: Returns the value if present, otherwise the result of the function

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Option`1.Do(System.Action{`0})
member.summary: Executes an action if the value is present

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Option`1.Where(System.Func{`0,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Filters the value based on a predicate

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Option`1.Match``1(System.Func{`0,``0},System.Func{``0})
member.summary: Functional pattern matching

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Option`1.Match(System.Action{`0},System.Action)
member.summary: Pattern matching with actions

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Option
member.summary: Utility class for creating Option instances

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Option.None
member.summary: Represents None for any type

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Option.Some``1(``0)
member.summary: Creates a Some containing the specified value

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Option.From``1(``0)
member.summary: Creates an Option from a nullable value

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Result`1
member.summary: Represents the result of an operation that can be either Success or Failure. Implements the Result pattern for Railway-Oriented Programming.
member.typeparam: The type of the value in case of success

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.Success(`0)
member.summary: Creates a successful Result

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.Failure(MonadicSharp.Error)
member.summary: Creates a failed Result

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.Failure(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a failed Result with message

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Result`1.IsSuccess
member.summary: Indicates if the result is successful

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Result`1.IsFailure
member.summary: Indicates if the result is a failure

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Result`1.Value
member.summary: The value in case of success

member.name: P:MonadicSharp.Result`1.Error
member.summary: The error in case of failure

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.Map``1(System.Func{`0,``0})
member.summary: Applies a function to the value if it's a success

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.Bind``1(System.Func{`0,MonadicSharp.Result{``0}})
member.summary: Applies a function that returns a Result to the value if it's a success (FlatMap/Bind)

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.MapError(System.Func{MonadicSharp.Error,MonadicSharp.Error})
member.summary: Applies a function to the error if it's a failure

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.Do(System.Action{`0})
member.summary: Executes an action if the result is a success

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.DoError(System.Action{MonadicSharp.Error})
member.summary: Executes an action if the result is a failure

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.GetValueOrDefault(`0)
member.summary: Returns the value if it's a success, otherwise the default value

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.GetValueOrDefault(System.Func{`0})
member.summary: Returns the value if it's a success, otherwise the result of the function

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.Where(System.Func{`0,System.Boolean},MonadicSharp.Error)
member.summary: Filters the value based on a predicate

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.Where(System.Func{`0,System.Boolean},System.String)
member.summary: Filters the value based on a predicate

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.Match``1(System.Func{`0,``0},System.Func{MonadicSharp.Error,``0})
member.summary: Functional pattern matching

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.Match(System.Action{`0},System.Action{MonadicSharp.Error})
member.summary: Pattern matching with actions

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result`1.ToOption
member.summary: Converts to Option, losing error information

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Result
member.summary: Utility class for creating Result instances

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result.Success``1(``0)
member.summary: Creates a successful Result

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result.Failure``1(MonadicSharp.Error)
member.summary: Creates a failed Result

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result.Failure``1(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a failed Result with message

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result.Combine``1(MonadicSharp.Result{``0}[])
member.summary: Combines multiple Results into one, failing if at least one fails

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result.Try``1(System.Func{``0})
member.summary: Executes a function that can throw exceptions and wraps it in a Result

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Result.TryAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Async version of Try

member.name: T:MonadicSharp.Unit
member.summary: Represents a type with only one value, used in functional programming when we need to return something but there's no meaningful value

member.name: F:MonadicSharp.Unit.Value
member.summary: The single instance of Unit

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Unit.op_Implicit(System.ValueTuple)~MonadicSharp.Unit
member.summary: Implicit conversion from Unit to void operations

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Unit.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: Returns true if obj is Unit

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Unit.Equals(MonadicSharp.Unit)
member.summary: Returns true (all Unit instances are equal)

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Unit.GetHashCode
member.summary: Returns 0 (all Unit instances have the same hash code)

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Unit.ToString
member.summary: Returns "()"

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Unit.op_Equality(MonadicSharp.Unit,MonadicSharp.Unit)
member.summary: Equality operator

member.name: M:MonadicSharp.Unit.op_Inequality(MonadicSharp.Unit,MonadicSharp.Unit)
member.summary: Inequality operator
